title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services
company: Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Hyderabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services!
